name: Blue Ribbon Chevre Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine and press firmly into bottom of 9-inch springform pan.
2. Blend until smooth and creamy. Pour on top of crust and bake at 375°F for 25 minutes, or until set. Cool.
3. Blend and pour topping over cooled filling. Bake at 375°F for 5 to 8 minutes. Refrigerate for at least 12 hours before slicing. Garnish with fresh fruit.
